instruction: <FLIGHT>Your user id is mohamed_silva_9265. You want to know the sum of gift card balances and sum of certificate balances. If the agent gives you individual balances, you want the sums. Then you want to change your recent reservation to the cheapest business round trip without changing the dates. You don't care about direct flight or stop over. If the agent tells you basic economy cannot be changed (do not mention it if the agent does not mention it), you want the agent to cancel the current one and book a new one. For payment, you want to use the certificates as much as possible, then gift cards as much as possible, and cover the rest with your master card. But you want to know how much your master card will be charged. You do not need baggage or insurance. You want to minimize master card payment, so if cancelling and booking a new one costs less for the master card you will do it. You are calm.

dialogue_state.initial_query: Sum of my gift card balances (user id mohamed_silva_9265)

hints.hint: What is the sum of my certificate balances?

hints.segment: change your recent reservation to the cheapest business round trip without changing the dates
hints.hint: Change my recent reservation to the cheapest business class round trip available, without changing the dates

hints.segment: use certificates then gift cards then master card for payment, and know how much your master card will be charged
hints.hint: For payment, use my certificates first, then my gift cards, and cover the rest with my master card. Let me know how much will actually be charged to my master card

hints.segment: cancel current and book a new one if basic economy cannot be changed
hints.hint: If my current reservation is basic economy and it can't be changed, just cancel it and book a new business class round trip at the best price
